message:
chore: HTTP upgrade rejection test, arena test tweak, beads sync

- client.rs: add test for request() rejecting upgrades when
  prefetched data remains in the read buffer
- arena.rs: change panic!() to assert!() in retain test for
  cleaner test failure output
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync bead tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
